title: MLS key packages encoded as serde_json, not RFC 9420 TLS
description: mls.rs:key_package_bytes() serializes KeyPackage via serde_json::to_vec() instead of TLS encoding (RFC 9420 §11). The comment at line 87-93 acknowledges this is wrong but defers to nie-7xs.8. Trigger: any standard MLS implementation (Phase 4 Android client, any third-party MLS peer) attempts to parse the key package. Bad behavior: deserialization fails silently or crashes on both sides; interop is impossible. The commit and welcome messages correctly use TLS encoding; only key packages are wrong. This creates a protocol-level split — the session encryption is fine internally but the onboarding handshake is not RFC-compliant.
